grapa.plot.plot_graph.Container

class grapa.plot.plot_graph.Container(fig: Figure, gs: GridSpec | None, matrix: ndarray, subplotsid: bool | Tuple[float, float], fontsize: int | float, ax_twinx: Axes | None, ax_twiny: Axes | None, ax_twinxy: Axes | None, groupedplotters: GroupedPlotters)

Bases: object

A dataclass to give many variables to functions
